text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, I'm wandering the campus grounds
in search of Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot her heading up the stairs to the roof, a
grave expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume I raced against the other day has
quit the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, after seeing my performance, she felt
that she could never compete.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She is not the first to feel that way. I have
watched several other Umamusume leave the
academy under similar circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
With every spirit I have inadvertently broken, I
have sworn to myself anew...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will do my utmost to make my racing a guiding
light...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A beacon to lead the way to a brighter future for
all Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But I cannot deny that I sometimes have doubts.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I seek to reach the top by climbing the mountain
of victory, for the good of all Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But am I truly doing that for their benefit? Or
simply to satisfy my own ego?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have asked myself this question many times, and
every time, I have concluded that my path is just.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I believe that even the Umamusume I hurt will
benefit from the future I hope to build.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I have to believe it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do you think my dream is worth pursuing?
choice_data_list:
A little late for second thoughts, don't you
think?

A little late for second thoughts, don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do you think my dream is worth pursuing?
choice_data_list:
A little late for second thoughts, don't you
think?

A little late for second thoughts, don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: At least one of us is free of doubts.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I'm simply feeling jaded today.
choice_data_list: It's nice to see a different side of you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I take my eyes off you for an instant, and there
you go, slipping ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Please, shake my hand once more and promise
me...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Promise me you'll stay by my side as I walk this
road...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And keep me straight and true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grasp Symboli Rudolf's hand, squeeze it firmly,
and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She smiles, just a little.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You're right. I was foolish not to see it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It's up to me to prove that my path is correct.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've grown a little too used to leaning on you, it
seems.
choice_data_list: I'm happy to be leaned on.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha, you're really too much sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Please, shake my hand once more and promise
me...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Promise me you'll stay by my side as I walk this
road...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And judge for yourself the leader I become.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grasp Symboli Rudolf's hand, squeeze it firmly,
and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She smiles, just a little.
